DeepSeek API

内容:

  • API参考
DeepSeek API
  • deepseek_api package
  • View page source

deepseek_api package

Submodules

deepseek_api.api module

class deepseek_api.api.DeepSeekHashV1Solver(wasm_path)[source]

Bases: object

A solver for DeepSeek’s Proof of Work (PoW) hash challenges.

This class uses a WASM module to solve PoW challenges required by the DeepSeek API. It is implemented as a thread-safe singleton to reuse the WASM engine across multiple solve operations.

static __new__(cls, wasm_path)[source]

Create or return the singleton instance of the solver.

Parameters:

wasm_path (str) – Path to the WASM module file containing the solving algorithm.

Returns:

The singleton solver instance.

Return type:

DeepSeekHashV1Solver

solve(challenge)[source]

Solve a PoW challenge and return the answer.

Parameters:

challenge (dict) – Challenge data containing: - challenge (str): The challenge string - salt (str): Salt value - difficulty (float): Difficulty level - expire_at (int): Expiration timestamp - signature (str): Challenge signature

Returns:

The solved answer value, or None if solving failed

Return type:

int

class deepseek_api.api.DeepSeekAPI(token=None, cookies={})[source]

Bases: object

Main client for interacting with the DeepSeek API.

This class provides methods for authentication, chat session management, message completion, file uploads, and other DeepSeek API functionalities.

__init__(token=None, cookies={})[source]

Initialize the DeepSeek API client.

Parameters:

  • token (str, optional) – Existing authentication token.

  • cookies (dict, optional) – Cookie dictionary for session persistence.

set_token(token)[source]

Set or update the authentication token.

Parameters:

token (str) – New authentication token to use for API requests.

is_logined()[source]

Check if the client is currently authenticated.

Returns:

True if authenticated, False otherwise.

Return type:

bool

login(account)[source]

Authenticate with DeepSeek using email/mobile and password.

Parameters:

account (dict) – Account credentials containing either: - email (str): Email address - mobile (str): Mobile number - password (str): Account password

Returns:

Authentication token for subsequent API calls.

Return type:

str

Raises:

  • TypeError – If neither email nor mobile is provided.

  • requests.HTTPError – If the login request fails.

do_pow(target_path)[source]

Generate and solve a Proof of Work challenge for an API endpoint.

Parameters:

target_path (str) – API path that requires PoW verification.

Returns:

Base64 encoded PoW response that can be used in the

’x-ds-pow-response’ header.

Return type:

str

create_chat()[source]

Create a new chat session.

Returns:

ID of the newly created chat session.

Return type:

str

get_chatlist(update=False)[source]

Retrieve the list of chat sessions.

Parameters:

update (bool) – If True, include updated_at parameter for pagination.

Returns:

List of chat sessions with their metadata:

  • id (str): Session ID

  • title (str): Session title

  • title_type (str): Title type (SYSTEM/USER)

  • pinned (bool): Whether session is pinned

  • updated_at (float): Last update timestamp

Return type:

dict

get_history_messages(chat_session_id)[source]

Retrieve message history for a specific chat session.

Parameters:

chat_session_id (str) – ID of the chat session.

Returns:

Message history containing:

  • message_id (int): Message identifier

  • role (str): USER or ASSISTANT

  • fragments (list): Message content fragments

  • files (list): Attached files

  • status (str): Message status

  • inserted_at (float): Timestamp

Return type:

dict

completion(chat_session_id, chat_text, parent_message_id=None, thinking=False, search=False, preempt=False, files=[])[source]

Send a message and get a streaming completion response.

Parameters:

  • chat_session_id (str) – Target chat session ID.

  • chat_text (str) – Message text to send.

  • parent_message_id (int, optional) – Parent message ID for context.

  • thinking (bool) – Enable thinking mode.

  • search (bool) – Enable web search capability.

  • preempt (bool) – Enable preemptive response.

  • files (list) – List of uploaded file IDs to attach.

Returns:

Streaming response object containing the AI’s reply.

Return type:

requests.Response

upload_files(files, chat_session_id=None, dealwith=None)[source]

Upload files to the DeepSeek server.

Parameters:

  • files (list) – List of file paths to upload.

  • chat_session_id (str, optional) – Chat session ID for Referer header.

  • dealwith (callable, optional) – Callback function for status updates.

Returns:

List of uploaded file IDs that can be used in completions.

Return type:

list

deepseek_api.api.parse_completion(completion_object)[source]

Parse a streaming completion response and print the content.

This is a utility function for testing and debugging purposes.

Parameters:

completion_object (requests.Response) – Streaming response from completion().

Returns:

Response message ID if available.

Return type:

str

Note

This function prints the response content in real-time and is intended for testing only, not as part of the main API.

deepseek_api.utils module

Utils.

deepseek_api.utils.parse_completion(completion_object)[source]

解析流式补全响应

Parameters:

completion_object – requests.Response对象 (stream=True)

Returns:

响应消息ID

Return type:

str

Example

>>> response = client.completion(...)
>>> message_id = parse_completion(response)
deepseek_api.utils.guess_mime_type(filename)[source]

猜测文件的MIME类型

Parameters:

filename (str) – 文件名

Returns:

MIME类型

Return type:

str

Module contents

DeepSeek API Python 3

Unofficial wrapper of DeepSeek Web API

class deepseek_api.DeepSeekAPI(token=None, cookies={})[source]

Bases: object

Main client for interacting with the DeepSeek API.

This class provides methods for authentication, chat session management, message completion, file uploads, and other DeepSeek API functionalities.

__init__(token=None, cookies={})[source]

Initialize the DeepSeek API client.

Parameters:

  • token (str, optional) – Existing authentication token.

  • cookies (dict, optional) – Cookie dictionary for session persistence.

set_token(token)[source]

Set or update the authentication token.

Parameters:

token (str) – New authentication token to use for API requests.

is_logined()[source]

Check if the client is currently authenticated.

Returns:

True if authenticated, False otherwise.

Return type:

bool

login(account)[source]

Authenticate with DeepSeek using email/mobile and password.

Parameters:

account (dict) – Account credentials containing either: - email (str): Email address - mobile (str): Mobile number - password (str): Account password

Returns:

Authentication token for subsequent API calls.

Return type:

str

Raises:

  • TypeError – If neither email nor mobile is provided.

  • requests.HTTPError – If the login request fails.

do_pow(target_path)[source]

Generate and solve a Proof of Work challenge for an API endpoint.

Parameters:

target_path (str) – API path that requires PoW verification.

Returns:

Base64 encoded PoW response that can be used in the

’x-ds-pow-response’ header.

Return type:

str

create_chat()[source]

Create a new chat session.

Returns:

ID of the newly created chat session.

Return type:

str

get_chatlist(update=False)[source]

Retrieve the list of chat sessions.

Parameters:

update (bool) – If True, include updated_at parameter for pagination.

Returns:

List of chat sessions with their metadata:

  • id (str): Session ID

  • title (str): Session title

  • title_type (str): Title type (SYSTEM/USER)

  • pinned (bool): Whether session is pinned

  • updated_at (float): Last update timestamp

Return type:

dict

get_history_messages(chat_session_id)[source]

Retrieve message history for a specific chat session.

Parameters:

chat_session_id (str) – ID of the chat session.

Returns:

Message history containing:

  • message_id (int): Message identifier

  • role (str): USER or ASSISTANT

  • fragments (list): Message content fragments

  • files (list): Attached files

  • status (str): Message status

  • inserted_at (float): Timestamp

Return type:

dict

completion(chat_session_id, chat_text, parent_message_id=None, thinking=False, search=False, preempt=False, files=[])[source]

Send a message and get a streaming completion response.

Parameters:

  • chat_session_id (str) – Target chat session ID.

  • chat_text (str) – Message text to send.

  • parent_message_id (int, optional) – Parent message ID for context.

  • thinking (bool) – Enable thinking mode.

  • search (bool) – Enable web search capability.

  • preempt (bool) – Enable preemptive response.

  • files (list) – List of uploaded file IDs to attach.

Returns:

Streaming response object containing the AI’s reply.

Return type:

requests.Response

upload_files(files, chat_session_id=None, dealwith=None)[source]

Upload files to the DeepSeek server.

Parameters:

  • files (list) – List of file paths to upload.

  • chat_session_id (str, optional) – Chat session ID for Referer header.

  • dealwith (callable, optional) – Callback function for status updates.

Returns:

List of uploaded file IDs that can be used in completions.

Return type:

list

class deepseek_api.DeepSeekHashV1Solver(wasm_path)[source]

Bases: object

A solver for DeepSeek’s Proof of Work (PoW) hash challenges.

This class uses a WASM module to solve PoW challenges required by the DeepSeek API. It is implemented as a thread-safe singleton to reuse the WASM engine across multiple solve operations.

static __new__(cls, wasm_path)[source]

Create or return the singleton instance of the solver.

Parameters:

wasm_path (str) – Path to the WASM module file containing the solving algorithm.

Returns:

The singleton solver instance.

Return type:

DeepSeekHashV1Solver

solve(challenge)[source]

Solve a PoW challenge and return the answer.

Parameters:

challenge (dict) – Challenge data containing: - challenge (str): The challenge string - salt (str): Salt value - difficulty (float): Difficulty level - expire_at (int): Expiration timestamp - signature (str): Challenge signature

Returns:

The solved answer value, or None if solving failed

Return type:

int

deepseek_api.parse_completion(completion_object)[source]

解析流式补全响应

Parameters:

completion_object – requests.Response对象 (stream=True)

Returns:

响应消息ID

Return type:

str

Example

>>> response = client.completion(...)
>>> message_id = parse_completion(response)
